meaning: n.(动植物的)生活环境,产地、栖息地,居留地,自生地,聚集处
examples: The panda's natural habitat is the bamboo forest.
This species has nearly died out because its habitat is being destroyed.
To save remaining herds and habitat, the national parks department is planning to cull 2000 elephants.
It is an important habitat for wading birds and a great recreational resource for Copenhageners.
As a braided river, typified by shallow, meandering channels separated by sandbars, it is an ideal crane habitat.
